title: selaginella dregei
intro: Selaginella dregei, also known as Spike moss or Spiked spikemoss, is a species of evergreen flowering plant in the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its small, spiky, and green leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Selaginella dregei include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and aid in digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in many cultures. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is often consumed as a tea or added to traditional remedies in the form of tinctures or powders.
